items.title: High-dimensional genomics and biomarkers
items.description: Microarray or RNA-seq studies start with tens of thousands of genes; filter and embedded methods identify small biomarker panels that remain biologically interpretable for diagnostics.

items.title: NLP bag-of-words models
items.description: Document classifiers use MI or chi-square filters to keep informative terms before linear or naive Bayes models, cutting vocabulary size and training time.

items.title: Credit risk tabular scoring
items.description: Regulators often require explainable inputs; L1 logistic regression or RFE yields sparse feature sets auditors can trace to original application fields.

items.title: Edge deployment with latency budgets
items.description: Mobile or IoT models drop unused sensor channels via selection so inference reads fewer inputs and uses smaller weight vectors.
